arts.ttl: Real Madrid set their sights on Real Sociedad midfielder Martín Zubimendi
arts.sum: Since Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos hung up his boots at the end of last season, there has been a real void in midfield in Carlo Ancelotti’s team. Los Blancos…

arts.ttl: 'Real Madrid? More like Tranmere' - has future talk 'affected' Trent?
arts.sum: A disappointing display in Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United has prompted questions about whether Trent Alexander-Arnold has been affected by talk about his future, with his contract ending this summer and Real Madrid interested?

arts.ttl: Manuel Prast and the only time Real Madrid dominated the Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s only period of true dominance in the Copa del Rey dates back to an era when both the club and the competition were known by different names. Real Madrid have threepeated the European cup twice, but they managed the same only once in the Copa del Rey

arts.ttl: Real Madrid join race for Abdukodir Khusanov as Manchester City meet player’s entourage
arts.sum: The race to sign RC Lens’ Abdukodir Khusanov (20) is hotting up. The Uzbekistan international is garnering interest from Europe’s elite with Lens giving the green light for a transfer…

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold not affected by Real Madrid approach – Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: The England international was at fault for Manchester United’s opener at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Endrick facing 'last chance' for Real Madrid in Copa del Rey tie against Minera
arts.sum: Endrick could be running out of time to impress at Real Madrid, with Monday night's Copa del Rey clash with fourth tier side Minera potentially a defining moment for the teenager.

arts.ttl: Endrick under huge pressure as Real Madrid examination arrives at crucial point
arts.sum: For Endrick, Real Madrid ’s first round of the Copa del Rey has become much more than a routine match to showcase his potential for a starting spot. Ancelotti has gone five games without giving the young Brazilian international any minutes, and when asked on TVE whether Endrick would start in the upcoming match at El Llano del Beal, the coach deflected with a vague “maybe.”

arts.ttl: Second report claims Liverpool and Manchester City target is wanted by Real Madrid
arts.sum: Suitors are something that Real Sociedad lynchpin Martin Zubimendi has never been short of, and in each of the last three summers, he has been cited as a top target for one of Europe’s best sides. Barcelona were the first to pursue him with intention, but now rivals Real Madrid are considering a move for […] The post Second report claims Liverpool and Manchester City target is wanted by Real Madrid appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'TOLD Real Madrid to bid' for him in January, says Jamie Carragher, as Liverpool legend gives insight on £20m offer that Gary Neville calls 'bullies taking the p**s'
arts.sum: Madrid tabled a £20million offer last week to bring him immediately to the Santiago Bernabeu rather than wait until summer for his contract to expire, but the Reds rejected it.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid slammed for 'INSULTING' Alexander-Arnold bid
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Gary Neville has criticised Real Madrid for submitting an “insulting” January bid for Trent Alexander-Arnold . Speaking to Sky Sports after the game, Neville admitted: “The bid from Real Madrid is bad timing for him [Alexander-Arnold].
